hardware_risk.detail: Chip temperature exceeded 90.0°C in 33.3% of readings (max 92.0°C).
hardware_risk.action: Immediately reduce load or increase cooling. Inspect immersion fluid level and pump operation.

business_impact.summary: Est. ~10 TH/s lost to throttling during critical periods (33% of time). ~$0.15/day revenue impact.

hardware_risk.action: Possible coolant flow interruption or pump failure. Inspect immersion loop immediately.
